ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "pcr_position" TEXT /* PCR position of the sample in the laboratory */,
  "rack_number" INTEGER /* Rack number where the sample is stored */,
  "rack_position" TEXT /* Position of the rack in the laboratory */,
  "is_pct" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sample is for PCR testing */,
  "is_nec" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sample is NEC (Necropsy) */,
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the sample (foreign key referencing sample_types table) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the sample (foreign key referencing statuses table) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the sample (foreign key referencing users table) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the sample (foreign key referencing users table) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID the sample belongs to (foreign key referencing projects table) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Study ID the sample belongs to (foreign key referencing studies table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_rack_number FOREIGN KEY ("rack_number") REFERENCES racks ("rack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type_id") REFERENCES sample_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racks" (
  "rack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rack */,
  "rack_number" INTEGER /* Number of the rack */,
  "rack_position" TEXT /* Position of the rack in the laboratory */,
  "storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of samples the rack can hold */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of samples in the rack */,
  "rack_type" TEXT /* Type of the rack (e.g., freezer, refrigerator) */,
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Room ID where the rack is located (foreign key referencing rooms table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_racks_room_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_id") REFERENCES rooms ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type (e.g., blood, tissue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  "type_class" TEXT /* Classification of the sample type (e.g., biological, chemical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pcr_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PCR test */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being tested (foreign key referencing samples table) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "primer_set" TEXT /* Primer set used for the test */,
  "thermal_cycler" TEXT /* Thermal cycler used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pcr_tests_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "necropsies" (
  "necropsy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each necropsy */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being necropsied (foreign key referencing samples table) */,
  "necropsy_date" TEXT /* Date the necropsy was performed */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the necropsy */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Procedure used for the necropsy */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("necropsy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_necropsies_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed (foreign key referencing samples table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample (foreign key referencing users table) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_access_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the room */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the storage condition */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the storage condition */,
  "light_exposure" TEXT /* Light exposure of the storage condition */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Sample ID of the sample stored under this condition (foreign key referencing samples table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_conditions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
